# LUME Controle Solar - Rio de Janeiro

## Overview
LUME Controle Solar is a premium window film (insulfilm) installation company based in Bangu, Rio de Janeiro, serving the entire West Zone (Zona Oeste) including Barra da Tijuca, Recreio, and Jacarepaguá. They specialize in high-performance residential and commercial architectural films.

## Key Services
- **Residential Insulfilm Installation:** Privacy, heat reduction, and UV protection for homes and apartments.
- **Commercial Insulfilm Installation:** Energy efficiency and professional aesthetics for offices and shops.
- **Glass Protection:** Anti-vandalism films and security solutions.

## Main Products
- **Nano Cerâmica:** 97% heat rejection (IRR), maximum clarity, ideal for condos.
- **Carbono Premium:** Color-stable, deep black finish, excellent heat rejection.
- **Dupla Camada:** Ultimate thermal barrier (up to 80% heat rejection), mirrored finish.
- **Refletiva (Prateada):** Classic solar control with high privacy.
- **Jateado:** 24h privacy with soft light diffusion (frosted look).

## Technical Specifications
- **Heat Rejection:** Up to 97% (Nano Cerâmica) or 80% TSER (Dupla Camada).
- **UV Protection:** 99.9% blocking on all premium lines.
- **Warranty:** 5 years on installation and product integrity.

## Contact & Location
- **Address:** Estrada do Realengo, 973 - Bangu, Rio de Janeiro, RJ.
- **WhatsApp:** +55 21 96514-0612
- **Website:** https://lumecontrolesolar.com.br/

## Service Areas (RJ)
- Bangu, Realengo, Campo Grande, Barra da Tijuca, Recreio dos Bandeirantes, Jacarepaguá, Vargem Grande, Vargem Pequena.
